formula_cell: phylo(1 | species, tree = tree) in mu
one_sided_miss_policy: report lower and upper misses, miss rates, and upper:lower ratio for every retained denominator; no inference_ready if severe miss imbalance remains
allowed_hosts: Nibi primary for the first SR150 pregrid after Fisher/Rose/Grace acceptance on 2026-06-30; Rorqual confirmation only under this contract; local artifact replay and design review remain required; Totoro/FIIA optional confirmation smoke only if access is restored
blocked_hosts: Any Nibi/Rorqual/DRAC denominator run that omits the 2026-06-30 Fisher/Rose/Grace review record; mixing hosts without a new contract; q1 sigma, matched mu+sigma, q2, q4/q8, non-Gaussian, REML, AI-REML, bridge support, public support, and supported claims outside this contract
stop_rule: Stop if candidate set changes, linked support cell is not point_fit/planned/planned, location-axis bias+t default is unavailable, any attempted row is dropped from the denominator, fit/convergence/pdHess/nonfinite interval/warning rows are not retained and classified, seed manifest or raw replicate TSV is missing, MCSE remains above 0.01 after top-up, one-sided misses are not reported, or any inference_ready/supported/public-support wording appears before SR150 evidence review.
claim_boundary: This promotes exactly no Q-Series row; it defines the retained-denominator pregrid contract for the q1 mu-intercept direct-SD location-axis target only; reviewed Nibi n=5 smoke is fixture evidence, not coverage; no interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, q1 sigma, matched mu+sigma, q2, q4/q8, non-Gaussian interval, REML, AI-REML, bridge support, or public support claim.
next_gate: Fisher/Rose/Grace accepted this contract on 2026-06-30; run an SR150 retained-denominator pregrid on one primary DRAC host with pinned threads, raw artifacts, one-sided misses, finite denominator, and no status promotion; MCSE <= 0.01 is a top-up target, not an SR150 pass claim; top up to SR475 or SR1000 only after reviewing MCSE and miss balance.
